mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADS ( AD_ID, USER_NO, BRAND_NAME, CONTENT, START_DATE, END_DATE, DURATION_WEEKS, AMOUNT, FILE_PATH, AGREED_YN, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_AD_ID.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{brandName}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{durationWeeks}, #{amount}, #{filePath}, #{agreedYn}, 'WAIT', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT a.AD_ID as adId, a.BRAND_NAME as brandName, m.USER_NAME as managerName, m.EMAIL as companyEmail, m.PHONE as phone, a.CONTENT as content, a.START_DATE as startDate, a.END_DATE as endDate, a.DURATION_WEEKS as durationWeeks, a.AMOUNT as amount, a.STATUS as status, a.CREATED_AT as createdAt, a.APPROVED_AT as approvedAt, a.FILE_PATH as filePath FROM ADS a LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON a.USER_NO = m.USER_NO ORDER BY a.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email}

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp FROM MEMBER ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, NICKNAME as nickname, PROFILE_IMG as profileImg, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp, NICKNAME as nickname, PROFILE_IMG as profileImg FROM MEMBER
STATUS = 1 AND SUSPENDED = 0 AND IDLE = 0
(STATUS = 0 OR SUSPENDED = 1)
AND (LOWER(EMAIL) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(NICKNAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%')
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) WHERE rn > #{start}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER
STATUS = 1 AND SUSPENDED = 0 AND IDLE = 0
(STATUS = 0 OR SUSPENDED = 1)
AND (LOWER(EMAIL) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(NICKNAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE SUSPENDED = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET SUSPENDED = 1 WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
UPDATE MEMBER SET SUSPENDED = 0 WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 0 WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO as productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE as productPrice, p.TRADE_STATUS as tradeStatus, TO_CHAR(p.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as regDate, c.CATEGORY_NAME as categoryName FROM PRODUCTS p JOIN MEMBER m ON p.SELLER_EMAIL = m.EMAIL LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_NO = c.CATEGORY_NO WHERE m.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND p.TRADE_STATUS != '거래완료' ORDER BY p.REG_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(REG_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_desc AS productDesc, p.product_price AS productPrice, p.seller_email AS sellerEmail, p.category_no AS categoryNo, p.trade_status AS tradeStatus, p.reg_date AS regDate, m.nickname AS sellerNickname FROM products p JOIN member m ON p.seller_email = m.email ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE TRADE_STATUS = '판매중'

SELECT a.AD_ID AS adId, a.BRAND_NAME AS brandName, m.USER_NAME AS managerName, m.EMAIL AS companyEmail, m.PHONE AS phone, a.CONTENT AS content, a.START_DATE AS startDate, a.END_DATE AS endDate, a.FILE_PATH AS filePath, a.STATUS AS status, a.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, a.APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt FROM ADS a LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON a.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE a.AD_ID = #{adId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ads SET status='CONFIRM', approved_at = SYSDATE WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
UPDATE ads SET status='REJECT', rejected_reason = #{reason}, approved_at = SYSDATE WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

choose.when: SELECT TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'MM/DD') as label, COUNT(*) as count FROM member WHERE reg_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'MM/DD') ORDER BY label ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM') as label, COUNT(*) as count FROM member WHERE reg_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY label ASC

mapper.select: SELECT keyword, COUNT(*) as "count" FROM search_log WHERE searched_at >= SYSDATE - 1 GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY "count" DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inquiry_id as inquiryId, title, member_email as memberEmail, created_at as createdAt, inquiry_status as inquiryStatus, is_faq as isFaq, is_private as isPrivate FROM inquiries WHERE is_faq = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT inquiry_id as inquiryId, title, member_email as memberEmail, created_at as createdAt, inquiry_status as inquiryStatus, is_faq as isFaq, is_private as isPrivate FROM inquiries WHERE is_faq = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE INQUIRY_STATUS != '답변완료' AND IS_FAQ = 'N') FROM DUAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADS WHERE STATUS = 'WAIT'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS WHERE TRUNC(REG_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT NVL(SUM(p.PRODUCT_PRICE), 0) FROM PRODUCTS p WHERE p.TRADE_STATUS = '거래완료' AND TRUNC(p.REG_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT NVL(WITHDRAW_REASON, '기타') AS REASON, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 0 GROUP BY NVL(WITHDRAW_REASON, '기타') ORDER BY CNT DESC FETCH FIRST 6 ROWS ONLY
SELECT TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'MM-DD') AS REG_DATE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM PRODUCTS WHERE REG_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'MM-DD') ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
SELECT C.CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(P.PRODUCT_NO) AS CNT FROM CATEGORY C LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS P ON C.CATEGORY_NO = P.CATEGORY_NO GROUP BY C.CATEGORY_NAME ORDER BY CNT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEWS

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT t.TRANSACTION_ID as transactionId, p.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, mb.NICKNAME as buyerNickname, ms.NICKNAME as sellerNickname, t.AMOUNT as amount, t.TRADE_STATUS as tradeStatus, t.TRADE_DATE as tradeDate, ROUND((SYSDATE - CAST(t.TRADE_DATE AS DATE)) * 24, 1) as hoursElapsed FROM TRANSACTIONS t JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER mb ON t.BUYER_EMAIL = mb.EMAIL LEFT JOIN MEMBER ms ON t.SELLER_EMAIL = ms.EMAIL ORDER BY t.TRADE_DATE DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) WHERE rn > #{start}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRANSACTIONS
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORTS SET REPORT_STATUS = #{status} WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId}
UPDATE INQUIRIES SET ADMIN_ANSWER = #{adminAnswer}, ANSWERED_AT = SYSDATE, INQUIRY_STATUS = '답변완료' WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO as productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, p.PRODUCT_DESC as productDesc, p.PRODUCT_PRICE as productPrice, p.SELLER_EMAIL as sellerEmail, m.NICKNAME as sellerNickname, c.CATEGORY_NAME as categoryName, p.TRADE_STATUS as tradeStatus, p.TRADE_METHOD as tradeMethod, TO_CHAR(p.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as regDate FROM PRODUCTS p JOIN MEMBER m ON p.SELLER_EMAIL = m.EMAIL LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_NO = c.CATEGORY_NO WHERE p.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS WHERE PRODUCT_NUM IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS WHERE ROOM_ID IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS WHERE REPORT_STATUS = '접수'
SELECT NVL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM ADS WHERE STATUS = 'CONFIRM' AND TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT NVL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM ADS WHERE STATUS = 'CONFIRM'
SELECT NVL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM TRANSACTIONS WHERE PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND TO_CHAR(TRADE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT NVL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM TRANSACTIONS WHERE PAY_STATUS = 'CANCEL' AND TO_CHAR(TRADE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'MM') AS MONTH_LABEL, NVL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) AS REVENUE FROM ADS WHERE STATUS = 'CONFIRM' AND APPROVED_AT >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(APPROVED_AT, 'MM'), TRUNC(APPROVED_AT, 'MM') ORDER BY TRUNC(APPROVED_AT, 'MM')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, T.* FROM ( SELECT A.AD_ID, A.BRAND_NAME, A.DURATION_WEEKS, A.AMOUNT, TO_CHAR(A.APPROVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPROVED_AT, TO_CHAR(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, M.EMAIL, M.USER_NAME FROM ADS A LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON A.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE A.STATUS = 'CONFIRM' ORDER BY A.APPROVED_AT DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) WHERE RN > #{start}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADS WHERE STATUS = 'CONFIRM'
